topCards.title: Transparency
topCards.desc: Clear explanation of data collection and usage.

topCards.title: Control
topCards.desc: Access, update, and request deletion of your data.

sections.title: 1. Introduction
sections.content: Welcome to TravelTourUp. We respect your privacy and are committed to protecting your personal data when you use our travel and booking services.

sections.title: 2. Information We Collect
points: Personal details such as name, email, and phone number
Booking data including destination, dates, and traveler information
Payment details processed securely through trusted providers
Device and usage data to improve performance and reliability
Location data for personalized travel suggestions
Communication history for customer support improvements

sections.title: 3. How We Use Your Information
sections.content: We use your data to process bookings, improve products, personalize your experience, send essential travel notifications, and provide support when needed.

sections.title: 4. Legal Basis for Processing
points: To fulfill contractual obligations (bookings and services)
To comply with legal and regulatory requirements
Based on your consent for marketing and optional services
For legitimate business interests such as improving services

sections.title: 5. Sharing Your Data
sections.content: We only share information with service partners such as airlines, hotels, and payment processors when necessary to fulfill your booking.

sections.title: 6. Third-Party Service Providers
points: Airlines and transport providers
Hotels and accommodation partners
Payment gateways and financial institutions
Analytics and performance monitoring tools

sections.title: 7. International Data Transfers
sections.content: Your data may be transferred to and processed in countries outside your residence to complete bookings and provide services globally.

sections.title: 8. Data Security
points: SSL encryption for all transactions
Secure payment gateways
Regular system monitoring
Restricted internal data access
Protection against unauthorized access and breaches

sections.title: 9. Cookies and Tracking Technologies
sections.content: Cookies help us keep the platform secure, remember your preferences, and understand traffic patterns so we can improve your experience.

sections.title: 10. Types of Cookies Used
points: Essential cookies for platform functionality
Performance cookies for analytics
Functional cookies to remember preferences
Marketing cookies for personalized offers

sections.title: 11. Data Retention
sections.content: We retain your personal data only as long as necessary for legal, operational, and business purposes.

sections.title: 12. User Accounts
points: You are responsible for maintaining account confidentiality
Ensure your login credentials are secure
Notify us immediately of unauthorized access

sections.title: 13. Your Rights
points: Access your personal data
Request corrections
Request deletion
Withdraw consent anytime
Object to certain types of data processing

sections.title: 14. Marketing Communications
sections.content: We may send promotional emails and offers. You can opt out anytime through unsubscribe links or account settings.

sections.title: 15. Children's Privacy
sections.content: Our services are not intended for individuals under 18. We do not knowingly collect data from children.

sections.title: 16. Third-Party Links
sections.content: Our platform may contain links to third-party services. We are not responsible for their privacy practices.

sections.title: 17. Payment Information
points: Payments are processed via secure third-party gateways
We do not store full credit/debit card details
Transactions are encrypted and monitored

sections.title: 18. Travel-Specific Data Usage
points: Passport and identification details for bookings
Travel preferences and history
Emergency contact information for trips
Special requests such as meals or accessibility needs

sections.title: 19. Policy Updates
sections.content: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Changes will be posted on this page with an updated revision date.

sections.title: 20. Contact Us
sections.content: If you have any questions or concerns regarding this Privacy Policy, please contact us at support@traveltourup.com.

topCards.title: Fair Use
topCards.desc: Honest details and lawful use of the platform.

topCards.title: Provider Rules
topCards.desc: Bookings follow airline and hotel policy terms.

topCards.title: Secure Payments
topCards.desc: Transactions are processed through secure partners.

sections.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
sections.content: By using TravelTourUp, you agree to these Terms of Service and any applicable policies referenced on this platform.

sections.title: 2. Eligibility
sections.content: You must be at least 18 years old and legally capable of entering into binding contracts to use our services.

sections.title: 3. Booking Services
sections.content: TravelTourUp provides booking support as an intermediary between travelers and third-party providers such as airlines, hotels, and transport partners.

sections.title: 4. Account Registration
points: Provide accurate and complete information
Maintain confidentiality of your account credentials
You are responsible for all activities under your account

sections.title: 5. Payments and Pricing
points: Payments are processed through secure payment gateways
Displayed prices may change based on availability and demand
Taxes, service charges, and provider fees may apply
Currency conversions may vary based on provider rates

sections.title: 6. Booking Confirmation
sections.content: Bookings are only confirmed after full payment and receipt of confirmation from the service provider.

sections.title: 7. Cancellations and Refunds
sections.content: Cancellation and refund eligibility depend on the policy of each provider. Please review fare conditions before confirming your booking.

sections.title: 8. Changes and Modifications
sections.content: Changes to bookings such as dates or traveler details are subject to provider policies and may incur additional charges.

sections.title: 9. User Responsibilities
points: Provide accurate traveler and payment information
Comply with visa, immigration, and local laws
Ensure valid travel documents
Avoid misuse, fraud, or unauthorized system access

sections.title: 10. Travel Documentation
sections.content: You are responsible for obtaining passports, visas, and any required travel permits before your trip.

sections.title: 11. Travel Risks
sections.content: Travel involves inherent risks. TravelTourUp is not responsible for delays, cancellations, or disruptions caused by external factors.

sections.title: 12. Third-Party Providers
sections.content: All travel services are provided by independent third parties. We are not liable for their actions, errors, or service quality.

sections.title: 13. Limitation of Liability
sections.content: TravelTourUp is not liable for disruptions caused by third-party providers, including delays, overbookings, cancellations, or force majeure events.

sections.title: 14. Force Majeure
sections.content: We are not responsible for failure to perform obligations due to events beyond our control such as natural disasters, pandemics, or government actions.

sections.title: 15. Prohibited Activities
points: Fraudulent bookings or transactions
System abuse or hacking attempts
Violation of applicable laws
Impersonation or identity misuse

sections.title: 16. Intellectual Property
sections.content: All content, branding, and platform materials are owned by TravelTourUp and may not be used without permission.

sections.title: 17. Termination
sections.content: We reserve the right to suspend or terminate accounts that violate these terms without prior notice.

sections.title: 18. Privacy Policy
sections.content: Your use of our services is also governed by our Privacy Policy, which explains how we collect and use your data.

sections.title: 19. Changes to Terms
sections.content: We may update these Terms of Service at any time. Continued use of the platform means you accept the updated terms.

sections.title: 20. Contact
sections.content: For questions regarding these terms, contact us at support@traveltourup.com.

AboutAchievements.title: Your Destination Awaits
AboutAchievements.subtitle: We have helped thousands of travelers explore amazing destinations worldwide. Our dedication to quality service continues to grow our success.
AboutAchievements.connectText: Let's connect. Reach out for more information.
